titleStmt.title: The Secretary of State to the Acting Secretary of State

head.hi: The Secretary of State to the Acting Secretary of State

div.p: 5. Reference arrangements for one copy of negative of German Foreign Office archives. Lord HalifaxBritish Ambassador and Delegate to United Nations Conference on International Organization at San Francisco. this morning informed me that our Embassy in London is pressing for another copy for Murphy and asked most urgently that the Embassy be instructed not to press this request but that we continue the agreement that this whole matter would be kept on the strictly confidential and limited basis for the present.In telegram 4344, June 1, 1945, to London, the Embassy was instructed not to request an additional copy of film for Mr. Murphy (840.414/5–2645).
